title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: Six paragraphs have been removed from the text. Choose the correct paragraph (A-G) to fill each gap. There is one extra paragraph.

content.text: The history of photography begins in the early 19th century. (1) ...... This first photograph took eight hours to expose.||Later developments made photography more practical. (2) ...... The invention of roll film by George Eastman revolutionized the medium...

example.text: The first permanent photograph was taken by Joseph Nicéphore Niépce in 1826.

paragraphs.A: The first permanent photograph was taken by Joseph Nicéphore Niépce in 1826.
paragraphs.B: Eastman's company, Kodak, introduced the first consumer camera in 1888.
paragraphs.C: Digital photography has now largely replaced film.
paragraphs.D: Louis Daguerre invented the daguerreotype process in 1839.
paragraphs.E: Photography became an art form in the late 1800s.
paragraphs.F: Color photography was developed in the early 20th century.
paragraphs.G: Smartphones have made photography accessible to everyone.

questions.explanation: Paragraph D continues the timeline with Daguerre's invention.
Paragraph B follows logically after mentioning roll film.
